case_title: BOERI, KETTY VS DOSS, MARIA D.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOERI, KETTY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOSS, MARIA D. $1,353.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,389.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
